top.name: Omniscience
top.rules_text: Draw your entire deck. This turn, all spells cost 0. At end of turn, discard your hand and exile 3 random cards from your discard.

bottom.name: Arcane Apotheosis
bottom.rules_text: Permanent: gain +1 charge per spell cast. Your Replicate copies also copy the bottom half. Spells that cost 3+ gain Reaction speed.

upgrades.description: Omniscience exiles fewer cards. Apotheosis lowers the Reaction threshold.

changes.value: Draw your entire deck. This turn, all spells cost 0. At end of turn, discard your hand and exile 2 random cards from your discard.
Permanent: +1 charge per spell cast. Replicate copies the bottom half too. Spells costing 2+ gain Reaction speed.

upgrades.description: Total Recall: exile only 1 card at end of turn.

changes.value: Draw your entire deck. This turn, all spells cost 0. At end of turn, discard your hand and exile 1 random card from your discard.

upgrades.description: Ascension: gain 2 charge per spell cast.

changes.value: Permanent: +2 charge per spell cast. Replicate copies the bottom half too. Spells costing 2+ gain Reaction speed.

upgrades.description: Foreknowledge: also bank 5 charge when cast.

changes.value: Gain 5 charge. Draw your entire deck. This turn, all spells cost 0. End of turn: discard hand, exile 1 random card from discard.

upgrades.description: Transcendent Mind: all spells gain Reaction speed.

changes.value: Permanent: +2 charge per spell cast. Replicate copies the bottom half too. ALL your spells gain Reaction speed.

upgrades.description: The All-Knowing: no end-of-turn exile at all.

changes.value: Gain 6 charge. Draw your entire deck. This turn, all spells cost 0. At end of turn, discard your hand (no exile).
Permanent: +2 charge per spell cast. Replicate copies both halves. All spells gain Reaction speed. Your first spell each turn is free.
